name: L-6 aggregator blocks a pattern whose PRs come from fewer than 2 distinct orgs per the architecture threshold
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"cfpb","tier":1}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'organizations_count=1' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
